description: Letter from Abū l-Barakāt b. Abū l-Ḥasan, in Alexandria, to Shelomo b. Eliyyahu, in Fustat. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Early 13th century. The letter informs Shelomo about the passing away of the local judge, R. Shemuel. Shelomo's father, Eliyyahu the judge, is asked to come and serve as judge in Alexandria. Gives many names of important community members in Alexandria. (Information from Frenkel.)
description_he: מכתב מאבו אל-ברכאת בן אבו אל-חסן, מאלכסנדריה, לשלמה בן אליהו, על מות השופט ר' שמואל
